mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person WHERE status != '已注销'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM floating_population WHERE status = '有效'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM key_population WHERE status = '有效'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household WHERE status = '正常'
SELECT key_type as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM key_population WHERE status = '有效' GROUP BY key_type
SELECT status as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM certificate GROUP BY status
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(in_date, '%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM migration_in WHERE in_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(in_date, '%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(out_date, '%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM migration_out WHERE out_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(out_date, '%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT l.log_id as id, u.username as operator, l.operation_type as type, l.target_table as targetTable, l.operation_result as result, DATE_FORMAT(l.operation_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as time, l.detail as detail FROM operation_log l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON l.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY l.operation_time DESC LIMIT 10
